description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that triggers on push events. Use a matrix strategy to build on ubuntu-latest for multiple Qt versions (5.15.2 and 6.5.2). For each job, check out the code, install Qt, and then install various dependencies including OpenCascade, Assimp, and locale for testing. Build the project using CMake with specific flags, and then execute unit tests in a virtual X11 display server.
